source.reference: .303 British Mk7 174gr FMJ. G7 BC~0.244 (Litz AB 4th Ed. ~0.240-0.250 range). Standard British service round WWI-WWII. Velocity ~745 m/s (24" barrel).
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.

notes: Chamber pressure: 360 MPa (~49,000 CUP). .303 British (7.7x56mmR) rimmed cartridge.
